segments.original_text: あ、見てたんですけれどもね
ギリギリ確定しませんでした

segments.text: Game & Watch's evasion options aren't top-tier or anything, but
segments.original_text: なかなかゲームアンドウォッチの回避優秀とは言い難いが

segments.text: That's what made it difficult, actually
segments.original_text: 逆にそれが難しかったか

full_text: Didn't you land it? Yeah, I was watching though. Just barely didn't confirm. Game & Watch's evasion options aren't top-tier or anything, but. That's what made it difficult, actually. Yeah

corrections.corrected: ゲームアンドウォッチ
